test_commands: SWORN_DIRECT=1 bin/sworn llm-check --type spec-ambiguity --slice S22-openrouter-tool-structured-output --release 2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance --model openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.2 --base a09b0e46df465862d00469d4aef2a997442b3d5b
reachability_artifacts: cmd/sworn/llmcheck_test.go:TestLLMCheckOpenRouterToolStructuredBinaryReachability drives the built binary through direct OpenRouter configuration into a local fake chat-completions endpoint

one newly Coach-authorized direct OpenRouter GLM-5.2 spec-ambiguity receipt for immutable S22 start commit a09b0e46df465862d00469d4aef2a997442b3d5b, recorded only after AC-07, AC-08, and deterministic evidence pass; it contains only check identity, model ID, start commit, process exit code, and PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED/UNPARSEABLE result

effort_complexity.rationale: Direct/proxy isolation, a public binary test seam, exact tool response integrity, retained canonical gate authority, and a real planning check must compose without broadening any provider capability.

verification.notes: Coach-authorized S22 recovery: the prior AC-06 invocation has no usable sanitized receipt and is neither a PASS nor a FAIL. The external evidence block is cleared only so a fresh Implementer can add AC-07 and AC-08, pass deterministic gates, and make exactly one new direct openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.2 proof with the allowlisted receipt. This is not a verifier verdict and no S20 activity is authorized without a fresh S22 PASS.

release_benefit: Lets the selected direct OpenRouter model produce a canonical generic-check result without weakening the fail-closed boundary for hosted proxy, Ollama, or unprofiled providers.

design_decisions.choice: Use an explicit direct-only OpenRouter forced-function route for the Coach-selected GLM-5.2 proof model, while retaining every proxy and unprofiled provider as structured-output unsupported.
options: direct-only existing forced-tool route with local canonical validation
treat OpenRouter as an OpenAI strict response-format endpoint
enable all OAI-compatible, proxy, or local endpoints based on URL resemblance
change a default model or canonical report schema
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified by Brad (Coach), 2026-07-17: use OpenRouter with GLM-5.2 for this proof path. The route remains direct-only and does not change a product default.
design_decisions.rationale: The selected model catalogue entry advertises tool support, OpenRouter documents a forced named-function chat-completions contract, and the existing forced-tool driver preserves the canonical schema plus S04's local semantic authority without claiming compatibility for another transport.

design_decisions.choice: Resume only S22 for two deterministic direct-tool guards and one newly authorized sanitized proof receipt.
options: resume S22 with JSON-null and non-function-type guards, then make one new direct proof with an allowlisted receipt
treat the unreceipted prior invocation as a pass or fail
retry through another provider, model, transport, or fallback
resume S20 before a fresh S22 verifier PASS
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified by the Coach, 2026-07-17: the prior AC-06 invocation has no usable evidence and is not a pass/fail result. After the two deterministic guard fixes and deterministic gates, exactly one new direct openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.2 S22 spec-ambiguity proof is authorized. It is not a silent retry; no fallback, further retry, or S20 activity is authorized absent fresh S22 PASS.
design_decisions.rationale: The advisory audit exposed two uncovered fail-closed cases: JSON null tool arguments and a returned tool call whose type is not function. A five-field sanitized receipt preserves a decisive, non-secret outcome while raw provider/model output remains private-temporary then destroyed or is never retained. Existing T1 code and immutable start commit a09b0e46df465862d00469d4aef2a997442b3d5b remain in place.

positive_scenarios: A direct built binary reaches a local OpenRouter-shaped endpoint with one forced canonical tool and accepts a valid ac-satisfaction object through the unchanged local gate.

After AC-07 and AC-08 deterministic guards plus all deterministic gates pass, the selected GLM-5.2 produces one allowlisted S22 spec-ambiguity receipt before fresh verification and an independent later S20 smoke.
negative_scenarios: Hosted proxy, Ollama, unknown providers, malformed endpoint overrides, missing/wrong/multiple tool calls, JSON null arguments, a non-function tool-call type, invalid canonical output, check mismatch, a non-PASS or unreceipted proof, and missing fresh S22 verification fail closed without fallback, a further retry, an S20 resume, or a real-home mutation.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: One bounded direct provider adapter plus two exact transport guards unlocks the user-selected release proof while preserving Sworn's trust boundary: provider transport can help produce an object, but only Baton canonical validation and a five-field receipt authorize the next lifecycle decision.

authorized_proof.raw_output_policy: private-temporary then destroyed, or never retained
prohibitions: S20 activity before fresh S22 PASS
